description_long: This is a small, cylindrical plant pot with a wide, open top and a single rounded handle, reminiscent of a mug. The exterior is decorated with a dark green band featuring colorful, stylized floral motifs, including yellow, white, red, and blue flowers with green stems and leaves. The interior and rim are a lighter green, contrasting with the darker exterior. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the pot's body, suggesting ease of carrying or repositioning. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, with no visible drainage holes at the base. Its playful floral design makes it suitable for decorative use in both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A small, green plant pot with a mug-like handle and a dark green band decorated with colorful, stylized flowers. The pot has a smooth, matte finish and a playful, decorative appearance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the handle on the right and a large yellow flower with green leaves on the dark green band.
description_view_1: The handle is centered, and a white flower is visible on the left side of the dark green band.
description_view_2: The handle is on the left, with a prominent white flower and part of a blue flower visible on the band.
description_view_3: The back view displays a blue bell-shaped flower and a red heart-shaped flower with green stems, with the handle barely visible at the top.
attribute_placement_context: perfect for brightening up a kitchen or living room with a playful, floral accent
attribute_decorative_pattern: colorful floral motifs on a dark green band
